steps.title: Use the since signal
steps.content: The phrase "since it began in 2012" describes an action that started in the past and continues to the present. Standard English uses present perfect tense for that pattern.

steps.title: Match subject and tense
steps.content: A is simple present, while B and D are future forms, so they do not fit the duration from 2012 to now. The plural subject "editors" needs present perfect with "have." The answer is C.
